findings.description: Section s11 lists 16 replacement variables in the content table, but the hints array omits 7 of them: `$PROP_TYPE$`, `$GETTER$`, `$SETTER$`, `#VALIDATION_IMPORTS#`, `#FIELD_ANNOTATION#`, `#PARAM_TO_FIELD#`, `#SETTER_ANNOTATIONS#`. Users searching for any of these variable names would not be routed to s11.
